PreToolUse.command: command -v context-mode >/dev/null 2>&1 && context-mode hook vscode-copilot pretooluse || true

PostToolUse.command: command -v context-mode >/dev/null 2>&1 && context-mode hook vscode-copilot posttooluse || true

SessionStart.command: command -v context-mode >/dev/null 2>&1 && context-mode hook vscode-copilot sessionstart || true
